command.name: Elliptical NACA Propeller Generator
command.description: Generates complete parametric elliptical propellers from transitioning NACA 4-digit airfoil sections.
ui.info: The values below are loaded from propeller_config.json and can be changed for this run. Propeller axis: Z; first blade: +Y. Language: {language}.
ui.radius_info: In automatic modes, the root, NACA transition and tip are always included exactly. In Slices mode, the final count can be Slices + 2 when the transition does not coincide with the grid.
ui.finalize_solid: Trim and stitch into a solid
ui.cut_below: Cut everything below the hub base (Z=0)
result.flat: Offset planes, one flat spline per profile and a trailing-edge closing line were created.
result.wrapped: A separate sketch was created for each wrapped section, with a 3D spline and a 3D trailing-edge closing line.
result.loft_fail:
The automatic loft did not converge. The sections were preserved for manual use.
Details: {detail}
result.extend_success: Root and tip extended successfully by {distance:.3f} mm.
result.extend_fail:
Automatic extension was not completed.
Details: {detail}
result.cylinders_fail:
Cylinder creation was not completed.
Details: {detail}
result.finalize_success:
Trim and stitch completed. A solid was created:
{name}
result.finalize_open:
Trim and stitch ran, but the result is still not a solid.
Details: {detail}
result.finalize_fail:
Automatic finalization was not completed.
Details: {detail}
result.assembly_fail:
Final assembly was not completed.
Details: {detail}
result.base_already_clear: The blade already had no geometry below Z=0.
result.joined: Hub and blades joined into one solid.
result.distribution: Radial distribution: {mode}. Root={root:.3f} mm; transition={transition:.3f} mm; tip={tip:.3f} mm.
result.header: {count} sections created in the root component.
error.panel:
The add-in loaded but could not find the SOLID > CREATE panel.
The command remains registered with ID: {id}
error.design_required: Open or create a Fusion Design document before running the command.
feature.loft: Blade loft — {count} sections — R{root:.3f} to R{tip:.3f} mm
feature.solid_blade: Solid blade — R{root:.3f} to R{tip:.3f} mm
feature.blade_base_trimmed: Single blade — base trimmed at Z=0
feature.blade_base_clear: Single blade — base already flat at Z=0
feature.section_plane: Section plane {index:02d} — R={radius:.3f} mm — sweep={sweep:.3f} deg
feature.flat_section: Flat section {index:02d} — R={radius:.3f} mm — c={chord:.3f} mm — beta={angle:.3f} deg — sweep={sweep:.3f} deg — N={points}
feature.wrapped_section: Wrapped 3D section {index:02d} — R={radius:.3f} mm — c={chord:.3f} mm — beta={angle:.3f} deg — sweep={sweep:.3f} deg — N={points}
language.name: English
feature.sweep_reference_plane: Sweep helper plane {index:02d} — R={radius:.3f} mm — sweep={sweep:.3f} deg
result.hoop_joined: Hoop joined to the propeller as one solid.
result.hoop_separate:
The hoop was preserved as a separate body.
Join attempt details: {detail}
result.hoop_fail:
Hoop creation was not completed.
Details: {detail}
feature.hoop: Peripheral hoop — ID {inner:.3f} × OD {outer:.3f} × H {height:.3f} mm — Z {offset:.3f} mm
ui.spinner_info: Spinners start at Z=0. The Hole_Diameter cut runs from Z=-0.5 mm to Z=Hub_Length+1.0 mm, matching the SCAD model. Both spinner types can be enabled together.
result.parabolic_spinner_joined: Parabolic spinner joined to the propeller.
result.parabolic_spinner_fail:
Parabolic spinner creation was not completed.
Details: {detail}
result.ogive_spinner_joined: Ogive spinner joined to the propeller.
result.ogive_spinner_fail:
Ogive spinner creation was not completed.
Details: {detail}
result.spinner_separate:
The spinner was preserved as a separate body.
Join attempt details: {detail}
feature.ogive_spinner: Ogive spinner — Ø{diameter:.3f} × L {length:.3f} mm — nose {nose:.4f}
save.error:
The parameters could not be saved:

{detail}
feature.airfoil_ring: NACA {naca} ring — reference Ø {diameter:.3f} mm — chord {chord:.3f} mm — Z {offset:.3f} mm
feature.final_propeller_airfoil_ring: Complete propeller with aerodynamic ring — {count} blades
result.airfoil_ring_joined: Aerodynamic ring joined to the propeller as one solid.
result.airfoil_ring_separate:
The aerodynamic ring was preserved as a separate body.
Join attempt details: {detail}
result.airfoil_ring_fail:
Aerodynamic ring creation was not completed.
Details: {detail}
